mapper.select: SELECT id, run_id, analysis_job_id, title, format, status, summary_jsonb, decision_map_jsonb, artifact_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version FROM report WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, run_id, analysis_job_id, title, format, status, summary_jsonb, decision_map_jsonb, artifact_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version FROM report WHERE run_id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
